I still see that port mapping hasn't changed

Patch Set 2:

I confirm it exposes two ports (http and https) now:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  
  name: ejbca
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ejbca
    helm.sh/chart: ejbca-6.0.0
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: test70
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Tiller
    
spec:
  ports:
    
    - port: 8443
      targetPort: api
      name: https-api
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: api-plain
      name: http-api
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ejbca
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: test70
    
  sessionAffinity: None

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2
